notes: Wikipedia 'Selected changes' table starts ~2009; pre-2009 reconstruction treats then-current members as if joining at earliest_change_date. Same-day rename pairs (e.g. FB->META 2022-06-09) are not collapsed; ticker_aliases.csv (Week 2 Day 9) handles renames. Week 2 reality patch removed a false pre-2025 Qnity interval caused by ticker reuse and corrected successor-ticker start dates for TT and HWM.
